title: Eternal Food
description:
Never be hungry again. 
A mod that provides you eternal/infinite food.
body:
![Eternal Food Banner](https://i.imgur.com/G7RtAaj.jpeg)

# An important update about supported versions

**We're discontinuing updates for older versions and will only maintain 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.11, and future 26.1.x (hotfixes only for unsupported versions).**

---


Tired of endlessly obtaining food just to survive? Here’s the solution:

This is a mod that lets you have everlasting food. You’ll have to work for it (obviously).
You’ll need to obtain the Eternal Diamond and use it to fuse into whatever food you want.

You’ll have every kind of variety at your disposal, check the gallery. But keep in mind they have cooldowns:
- Regular eternal foods share a **300-tick cooldown** (the same for their raw versions).
- The Eternal Golden Apple has a **600-tick cooldown** and the Enchanted Eternal Golden Apple has a **900-tick cooldown**. Eating one will trigger the cooldown for the other.

Ready to dive into the world of eternity?

## Extra information:

- All normal foods have a **300-tick shared cooldown** and cannot be used to cultivate.
- Eternal raw foods have their **own cooldown**, separate from normal food.
- Eternal Golden Apple has a **600-tick cooldown**.
- Eternal Enchanted Golden Apple has a **900-tick cooldown**.
- Eternal Golden Apple and Eternal Enchanted Golden Apple **share the cooldown**.
- This configuration **cannot be changed**.

**Made by JotaPanden**
